opportunities.title: [Hiring] Remote Assistants for Online Work (USA/EU Projects) (20$-50$per week)
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Remote Assistants for Online Work (USA/EU Projects) (20$-50$per week)

We’re currently looking for remote assistants to help with online tasks and community-based work. Flexible timing and beginner-friendly. Tasks may include: Posting and managing content Finding online opportunities/leads Basic communication and coordination Remote support work Prefer people who: Are active online Can communicate properly Have basic Reddit/Telegram knowledge Open to applicants worldwide.   submitted by   /u/TrexInaF14 [link]   [comments]

opportunities.title: [Hiring] Need CAD Designer to help make .stl files for 3d printing ($20-$50USD/design based on complexity)
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Need CAD Designer to help make .stl files for 3d printing ($20-$50USD/design based on complexity)

I have sketches of things I'd like to 3D print. I need someone who is able to use the sketches/renderings into .stl files for print. I am happy to send examples of the first project I need (small heart keychain) so you can get a better idea of projects I am working on.   submitted by   /u/gotpoopstains [link]   [comments]

opportunities.title: Cleaner
opportunities.description:
About the role

We are looking for a Cleaner to take care of our branch and carry out cleaning and maintenance duties. Cleaning designated facility areas. Performing and documenting routine inspection and maintenance activities. Carry out heavy cleansing tasks and special projects



The goal is to keep our building in a clean and orderly condition.
